name: midas
description: Deterministic scaffolding that lifts mid-tier model agentic quality with explore-before-edit, verify-before-stop, retry-thrash detection, and on-demand playbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Explore, plan, debug, and verify gates for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Midas bundles deterministic Codex hooks and compact skills that nudge agents toward exploration before edits, structured planning, systematic debugging, and evidence-backed verification before completion.
defaultPrompt: Use Midas discipline in this repo
